title: Education essentials
description: Useful words for school, university, and academic life.

items.example: Students go to university to gain knowledge and practical skills.

items.meaning: to improve useful abilities through study or practice
items.example: Group projects help students develop skills such as teamwork.

items.meaning: to go to formal classes at a college or university
items.example: Some students attend lectures in person, while others watch online.

items.meaning: to finish work before the required time
items.example: Time management is important if you want to meet deadlines.

items.meaning: money paid for education at a school or university
items.example: Tuition fees can be a serious burden for some families.

items.meaning: education at college or university level
items.example: Higher education can open the door to more career options.
